title: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Stillbirth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Medical Care Expense Assistance * Stillbirth 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Breast Cancer Cancer Cervical Cancer Stillbirth Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HAYDEN'S HELPING HANDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance to families who deliver a stillbirth. Financial assistance is for the delivery bills only; does not offer financial assistance for any other medical bills. PO Box 2041 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Families who deliver a stillbirth, at least 20 weeks gestation Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 504-0512 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HAYDEN'S HELPING HANDS HAYDEN'S HELPING HANDS
